purpose: Initial public-source document set for manual gold annotation pilot
selection_policy: Prefer documents with raw text conversions.
Prefer documents with functional requirement extracts or curated relevant text.
Mix PURE-family and custom public sources to avoid overfitting the pilot to one corpus style.
Cover different software domains so the slot schema is tested outside one vertical.

documents.reason: Strong PURE-family candidate with raw text and functional requirement extract.
Useful library-management domain with raw text and curated relevant text.
Accessible transactional domain with functional requirement extract.
Security-sensitive domain with curated relevant text for NFR testing.
Administrative workflow domain with functional requirement extract.
Useful for privacy and security constraints with curated relevant text.
High-value pilot candidate because it includes raw text, functional extracts, relevant text, and use cases.
Domain-diverse infrastructure system with functional requirement extract.
